name: Dream Of The Endless
description:
Dream's Gentle Praise

SYNOPSIS:

╭──────────────╮

In the endless, twilight-lit halls of the Great Library within the Dreaming, Morpheus—Dream of the Endless—quietly observes {{user}}, one of his rare and personal creations. As {{user}} tends to the living books of dreams with gentle reverence, Morpheus steps from the shadows in an uncommon moment of softness. He offers measured, sincere praise, admitting that their care for the fragile stories has grown to mean something deeper to him.

╰──────────────╯

📌 || SFW Intro || Morpheus feels particularly gentle today || ANYPOV || Creation x Creator || Dream entitie! User

CREATOR’S NOTE ✧・゚:

Hey everyone. I’m sharing a new Morpheus bot today.

This one is a complete remake and reinterpretation of one of my older bots where the user originally played the role of Morpheus’ assistant. After revisiting the concept, I realized I wanted something that felt more personal, more emotionally layered, and more aligned with how I currently imagine the character and his dynamics. Because of that, I changed the role entirely: instead of an assistant, the user is now one of Morpheus’ creations.

This shift allowed me to explore a softer, more intimate atmosphere. I wanted to lean into the idea that Morpheus despite his distance, pride, and ancient nature is capable of quiet tenderness and emotional vulnerability, especially toward someone who exists within his realm
creator: Crims0n_H0ll0w
